prompt: {"type":"6-panel commercial storyboard","product":{"category":"sparkling lemon drink","brand text":"{argument name=\"brand text\" default=\"LEMON\"}","packaging":"tall slim aluminum can, white can with realistic yellow lemon illustrations, green leaves, subtle silver pattern, gold top, covered in condensation droplets"},"style":{"look":"premium beverage advertisement, cinematic lifestyle photography, bright Mediterranean summer, clean commercial color grading, high realism","lighting":"strong natural sunlight, warm golden highlights, crisp blue-sky reflections, sparkling water highlights","aspect_ratio":"16:9 overall canvas divided into 6 equal panels in a 3x2 grid"},"setting":{"location":"sunny seaside terrace overlooking a blue ocean bay with distant cliffs and white buildings","season":"summer","mood":"fresh, breezy, joyful, refreshing"},"cast":{"count":1,"subject":"smiling young blonde woman with wavy shoulder-length hair, light tan skin, hoop earrings, delicate necklace, white spaghetti-strap summer dress"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1","position":"top-left","count":1,"labels":["opening lifestyle shot"],"scene":"medium portrait of the woman standing outdoors by the sea, flowers blurred at far left, looking ahead with relaxed happy expression, ocean and cliffs behind her","on_screen_text":"阳光洒下，美好的一天开始了"},{"title":"2","position":"top-right","count":1,"labels":["product introduction"],"scene":"close-up of the smiling woman holding the can beside her face toward camera, label clearly visible, ocean horizon in background","on_screen_text":"全新口味，清新登场"},{"title":"3","position":"middle-left","count":1,"labels":["drinking moment"],"scene":"close side view of the woman lifting the can to her lips to drink, hair backlit, beach and sea softly blurred behind","on_screen_text":"一口清爽，唤醒活力"},{"title":"4","position":"middle-right","count":1,"labels":["hero splash product shot"],"scene":"single can standing upright in crashing ice water with 3 visible lemon pieces around it, dramatic splash frozen in motion, ultra-detailed droplets and cold texture","on_screen_text":"真实果汁，冰爽畅快"},{"title":"5","position":"bottom-left","count":1,"labels":["direct offer shot"],"scene":"the woman extends her arm toward the camera, presenting the can in the foreground, her body and face slightly behind in softer focus, seaside cliffs in background","on_screen_text":"随时随地，享受好心情"},{"title":"6","position":"bottom-right","count":1,"labels":["final packshot"],"scene":"clean tabletop packshot with 1 upright can centered near the sea, 2 whole lemons and 1 cut lemon half arranged around it, bright sun glittering on the water, distant rocky coast behind","on_screen_text":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"清新每一刻\"}\n让生活更有滋味"}],"panel_numbers":"large bold white numbers 1 through 6 placed at the upper-left corner of each panel"},"typography":{"language":"Chinese","style":"simple bold white sans-serif ad captions, small captions at lower left in panels 1 to 5, large headline at upper right in panel 6"},"constraints":["keep all 6 panels visually consistent as one ad storyboard","emphasize condensation, citrus freshness, and bright coastal atmosphere","high-end beverage commercial composition","no extra people","no logos other than the can brand text"]}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"6 画面商业项目","product":{"category":"柠檬气泡饮料","brand text":"{argument name=\"brand text\" default=\"LEMON\"}","packaging":"细长铝罐，白色罐身配有逼真的黄色柠檬插画、绿叶、精致的银色图案、金色罐顶，表面覆盖着冷凝水珠"},"style":{"look":"高端饮料广告，电影级生活方式摄影，明亮的地中海夏季，干净的商业调色，高真实感","lighting":"强烈的自然阳光，温暖的金色高光，清脆的蓝天倒影，气泡水高光","aspect_ratio":"16:9 整体画布，分为 3x2 网格的 6 个等分画面"},"setting":{"location":"阳光明媚的海滨露台，俯瞰蓝色海湾，背景有远处的悬崖和白色建筑","season":"夏季","mood":"清新、微风、愉悦、提神"},"cast":{"count":1,"subject":"面带微笑的年轻金发女性，留着齐肩波浪卷发，浅棕色皮肤，佩戴圆环耳环和精致项链，身穿白色细肩带夏装"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1","position":"左上","count":1,"labels":["开场生活方式镜头"],"scene":"女性在海边户外站立的中景肖像，左侧远处有模糊的花朵，神情放松愉悦地看向前方，身后是海洋和悬崖","on_screen_text":"阳光洒下，美好的一天开始了"},{"title":"2","position":"右上","count":1,"labels":["产品介绍"],"scene":"微笑的女性将罐装饮料举在脸旁面向镜头，标签清晰可见，背景为海平线","on_screen_text":"全新口味，清新登场"},{"title":"3","position":"左中","count":1,"labels":["饮用瞬间"],"scene":"女性将罐装饮料举至唇边饮用的侧面近景，头发带有背光，海滩和大海在背景中柔和虚化","on_screen_text":"一口清爽，唤醒活力"},{"title":"4","position":"右中","count":1,"labels":["产品特写镜头"],"scene":"单罐饮料立于碎冰水中，周围有 3 片可见的柠檬，定格的戏剧性水花，超细节的水珠和冰凉质感","on_screen_text":"真实果汁，冰爽畅快"},{"title":"5","position":"左下","count":1,"labels":["直接展示镜头"],"scene":"女性向镜头伸出手臂，在前台展示罐装饮料，她的身体和脸部在背景中略微虚化，背景为海滨悬崖","on_screen_text":"随时随地，享受好心情"},{"title":"6","position":"右下","count":1,"labels":["最终产品展示"],"scene":"干净的桌面产品展示，一罐饮料立于海边中心，周围摆放着 2 个完整的柠檬和 1 个切开的柠檬半块，明亮的阳光在水面上闪烁，背景是远处的岩石海岸","on_screen_text":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"清新每一刻\"}\n让生活更有滋味"}],"panel_numbers":"每个画面左上角放置 1 到 6 的大号粗体白色数字"},"typography":{"language":"中文","style":"简洁的粗体白色无衬线广告字幕，画面 1 至 5 左下角为小字幕，画面 6 右上角为大标题"},"constraints":["保持所有 6 个画面作为同一个广告项目在视觉上的一致性","强调冷凝水珠、柑橘新鲜感和明亮的海滨氛围","高端饮料商业构图","没有额外人物","除罐身品牌文字外无其他标志"]}

breakdown.creativeCore: 柠檬饮料广告项目：一个由六幅画面组成的电影级饮料广告项目，展示了一位金发女性和一款柠檬气泡饮料在阳光明媚的海滨商业场景，非常适合广告概念设计和视频预演。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, grid]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
